mechanics.excerpt: the five ruling Houses oined together in the Star League_ federation led by First Lord and served by its own army: For nearly two hundred years_ the Star League brought the Inner Sphere peace and prosperity: The sudden death 0f its First Lord, however; paved the way for an evil genius named Stefan Amaris to stage bloody coup d'etat: The Star League Defense Forces, commanded by the brilliant General Aleksandr Kerensky; refused to accept Amaris rule They fought him in bitter civil war that was the largest conflict ever fought by humanity; before or since_ Kerensky' forces won; but at terrible price.
